name: Total Uptime Technologies
notes:
We operate a global anycast network and offer services including Cloud DNS, Cloud Load Balancing, Web Application Firewall (WAF) and Cloud VPN. We may announce all of our prefixes at all of our mutual interconnects, or we may selectively choose which to announce based on the location of your network footprint and where we interconnect.

**Global providers must peer at all geographies. Regional providers are permitted to peer in that region only.

**Please set max prefix to 100. We announce all utilized IPv4 space as /24s and all IPv6 space as /48s.

NOTE: When new peering sessions are established, they will initially be configured to announce only test prefixes Sessions will be normalized in a maintenance window within 72 hours of turn-up.
